name: io.github.ajsmonty/adobe-mcp
description: Drive Adobe Creative Cloud (After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, Character Animator) from any MCP client — ExtendScript bridges, cross-app asset handoffs, inline visual previews, and a self-learning gotcha knowledge base. macOS.

environmentVariables.name: ADOBE_MCP_WORKSPACE
environmentVariables.description: Directory for rendered assets, the asset registry, and learned lessons (default: ~/AdobeMCP)
